title: Tricuspis
taxonomy: Tricuspis is a genus of flowering plants in the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the iris family. The genus Tricuspis is native to southern Africa and is characterized by its distinctive three-lobed leaves and funnel-shaped flowers. Tricuspis species are often found growing in rocky outcrops and mountainous regions. The classification of Tricuspis places it within the subfamily Iridoideae, which is a large and diverse group of irises. Further classification within the family Iridaceae is ongoing, with some sources placing Tricuspis in the tribe Irideae.
